message:
feat(core): implement CTE (WITH clause) support via table materialization (bd-vrdo)

Add execute_with_ctes() method that materializes each CTE as a temporary
in-memory table, executes the main query with WITH stripped, then cleans
up. Includes infer_select_column_names() helper for auto-deriving column
names from SELECT result columns. Remove WITH rejection guards from
execute_group_by_select() and compile_expression_select(). Also fixes
concurrent clippy/lint issues (exprs_equal, map_or, ref pattern).

4 tests: basic CTE, column-name override, multiple CTEs, CTE with aggregation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
